items.note: The framework reached implementation, and the inspection fight became its first hard test. Rafael Grossi insisted access is coming regardless of timing — “This is going to happen” — while Iran's deputy foreign minister tied any entry to the bombed Fordow, Natanz and Isfahan sites to a final agreement and to sanctions being lifted first, leaving confident supervision language on one side and conditional access on the other.

Lebanon is the framework's tripwire. Israeli and Lebanese negotiators discussed US-backed plans to move trained Lebanese army units into southern “pilot zones” near Beaufort Castle to replace Israeli forces, while a five-party de-confliction cell took over ceasefire monitoring in a way that constrains Israeli strikes — even as the IDF kept hitting perceived Hezbollah targets near Ali al Taher.

The reopening held and the war premium drained, but the leverage did not disappear. ISW assessed that Iran is using the MoU talks to reach arrangements with Gulf states that would preserve Iranian influence around the strait into the post-war period, even as tanker traffic climbed and crude slid toward the low $70s.

El Obeid stands inside the prevention window — RSF encirclement and intensifying drone and artillery fire, with no confirmed urban ground entry. Refugees International warned of imminent atrocities, and the UN human rights chief and several European governments demanded the assault be halted; the missing fall-of-the-city confirmation is a limit of wartime evidence, and the protective action still lags the warning.

items.what: Tanker traffic through Hormuz kept climbing and Brent slid toward the low $70s as the war-risk premium drained, even as the IRGC said vessels should use Iran-coordinated routes — the reopening holding while Tehran presses a permission claim the screen is largely ignoring.

Taipei's defence ministry said the warning time for any Chinese attack is shortening, citing novel activity in the waters east of Taiwan; Britain, France and Germany flagged the Pacific-side moves as a risk to regional stability and shipping.

Agentic tools advanced on two fronts: OpenAI published research on how agents are reshaping knowledge work toward longer, delegated tasks, and Google opened a public preview of a Computer Use tool in Gemini 3.5 Flash that drives browsers through the DevTools protocol.

Helsing unveiled the CA-1 Electronic Attack, an autonomous jamming aircraft meant to open corridors through hostile air defences, and signed a deal with EURENCO for a sovereign European strike drone — Europe pressing AI-defined airpower independent of US supply chains.
The contested Wishah case stayed unresolved — Israel's military-ID evidence set against Al Jazeera's account of a targeted journalist — a named casualty whose status the two sides still dispute.
